---
applyTo: "README.md,docs/**/*.md"
---

Keep documentation concise and practical.
Never use emojis.
Do not add new markdown files unless explicitly requested.
Do not add decorative sections, badges, roadmap sections, or long narrative explanations.
Prefer exact commands, architecture facts, and usage instructions.
Maintaining a useful root README.md is allowed and encouraged when setup or usage changes.
Do not create docs/roadmap files, migration notes, or changelog files unless explicitly asked.
